text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Baqaei: The US is the primary party responsible for insecurity in the Strait of Hormuz Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️The tensions in the Persian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz are solely the result of military actions by the US and the Zionist…" 🇮🇷 Baqaei: The armed forces will respond to any new adventurism Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️ The Islamic Republic of Iran does not recognize any deadlines or ultimatums in securing its national interests. 🔸️ Iran did not start this war, and the military operations in June and March 2026 were carried out solely in legitimate defense of the country's sovereignty. 🔸️ The protection of national interests will continue for as long as necessary, and in the event of any new adventurism by the US or the Zionist regime, the armed forces will respond with full force and resolve. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 巴盖伊：美国是霍尔木兹海峡不安全的主要责任方。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️波斯湾和霍尔木兹海峡的紧张局势完全是美国和犹太复国主义者的军事行动造成的……” 🇮🇷 巴盖伊：武装部队将对任何新的冒险主义作出回应。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️伊朗伊斯兰共和国不承认任何以牺牲其国家利益为代价的最后期限或通牒。🔸️伊朗没有发动这场战争，2026年6月和3月的军事行动完全是为了合法捍卫国家主权。🔸️保护国家利益的工作将根据需要持续进行，如果美国或犹太复国主义政权进行任何新的冒险，武装部队将以全力和决心作出回应。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Baqaei: The government will not forget America's repeated betrayals of diplomacy Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️It is impossible to forget the costly experiences of the past year and America's repeated betrayals of diplomacy. 🔸️In less than 9…" 🇮🇷 Baqaei: The US is the primary party responsible for insecurity in the Strait of Hormuz Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️ The tensions in the Persian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz are solely the result of military actions by the US and the Zionist regime. 🔸️ Prior to February 28, the region enjoyed complete security. The international community must therefore hold these two actors accountable for destabilizing the region and avoid swapping the roles of "perpetrator" and "victim." 🔸️ Regarding the incident in question, competent authorities are currently conducting a thorough investigation into its dimensions, and results will be announced subsequently. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 巴盖伊：政府不会忘记美国对外交的反复背叛。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️不可能忘记过去一年代价高昂的经历以及美国对外交的反复背叛。🔸️在不到9个月的时间里……” 🇮🇷 巴盖伊：美国是霍尔木兹海峡不安全的主要责任方。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️波斯湾和霍尔木兹海峡的紧张局势完全是美国和犹太复国主义政权的军事行动造成的。🔸️在2月28日之前，该地区享有完全的安全。因此，国际社会必须追究这两个行为体破坏地区稳定的责任，并避免颠倒“肇事者”和“受害者”的角色。🔸️关于所涉事件，主管当局目前正在对其各个方面进行彻底调查，结果将随后公布。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Baqaei: Attack on Iranian commercial vessel constitutes an act of aggression Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️The US, through contradictory behavior and continuous violations of ceasefire terms, has shown it lacks seriousness in pursuing the diplomatic…" 🇮🇷 Baqaei: The government will not forget America's repeated betrayals of diplomacy Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️ It is impossible to forget the costly experiences of the past year and America's repeated betrayals of diplomacy. 🔸️ In less than 9 months, Washington twice attacked Iran's sovereignty during ongoing negotiations — violating international law, killing senior figures and civilians, and damaging national assets. 🔸️ Accordingly, all pillars of the system are monitoring developments with full vigilance, as guarding against the enemy's plots within the diplomatic process is a rational duty — and even more vital than during wartime. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 巴盖伊：对伊朗商船的袭击构成侵略行为。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️美国通过矛盾的行为和持续违反停火条款，表明其在追求外交方面缺乏诚意……” 🇮🇷 巴盖伊：政府不会忘记美国对外交的反复背叛。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️不可能忘记过去一年代价高昂的经历以及美国对外交的反复背叛。🔸️在不到9个月的时间里，华盛顿在谈判进行期间两次侵犯伊朗主权——违反国际法，杀害高级官员和平民，并破坏国家资产。🔸️因此，国家的所有支柱都在保持高度警惕地监测事态发展，因为在外交进程中防范敌人的阴谋是一项理性的职责——甚至比战时更为重要。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Esmaeil Baqaei, spokesman for the Iranian Foreign Ministry: We have no plan for the next round of negotiations. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics" 🇮🇷 Baqaei: Attack on Iranian commercial vessel constitutes an act of aggression Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️ The US, through contradictory behavior and continuous violations of ceasefire terms, has shown it lacks seriousness in pursuing the diplomatic process. 🔸️ Washington's recent actions — including breaking commitments on Lebanon and attempts to impose a naval blockade on Iran that led to an attack on an Iranian commercial vessel — constitute a clear "act of aggression" under UN resolutions. 🔸️ This glaring contradiction between words and actions deepens the Iranian people's distrust of US intentions. Iran will therefore make the appropriate decision regarding the continuation of the negotiations track, prioritizing national interests and considerations. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：我们没有下一轮谈判的计划。🔴 @DDGeopolitics” 🇮🇷 巴盖伊：对伊朗商船的袭击构成侵略行为。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️美国通过矛盾的行为和持续违反停火条款，表明其在追求外交进程方面缺乏诚意。🔸️华盛顿近期的行动——包括违背在黎巴嫩问题上的承诺，以及试图对伊朗实施海上封锁导致袭击伊朗商船——根据联合国决议，构成了明确的“侵略行为”。🔸️这种言行之间明显的矛盾加深了伊朗人民对美国意图的不信任。因此，伊朗将根据国家利益和考量，就谈判进程的延续作出适当决定。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 Esmaeil Baqaei, spokesman for the Iranian Foreign Ministry: We have no plan for the next round of negotiations. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：我们没有下一轮谈判的计划。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 Sever-V Brigade operators spotted a Ukrainian self-propelled gun moving through their area of responsibility, tracked it to a concealed position, and cracked it open with FPV drone strikes — forcing the crew to relocate. The SPG drove straight into another trap. Drone operators followed its every move and hit it again at the new position, destroying it. Vid: @Sever_Z 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 “北方-V”旅的操作员发现一门乌克兰自行火炮在其责任区内移动，追踪其至隐蔽位置，并用FPV无人机打击将其击毁，迫使乘员转移。该自行火炮直接驶入了另一个陷阱。无人机操作员跟踪了它的一举一动，并在新位置再次击中它，将其摧毁。视频：@Sever_Z 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Polish Foreign Minister Sikorski: IDF soldiers themselves admit to war crimes. They killed not only civilian Palestinians but even their own hostages.
text_zh: 波兰外交部长西科尔斯基：以色列国防军士兵自己承认犯下了战争罪。他们不仅杀害了巴勒斯坦平民，甚至还杀害了他们自己的人质。

text: Xi Jinping: The Strait of Hormuz should remain open for normal passage, which aligns with the common interest of countries in the region and the international community.
text_zh: 习近平：霍尔木兹海峡应保持正常通行，这符合地区国家和国际社会的共同利益。

text: Michael A. Horowitz US pressuring Iraq? Al-Hadah reports that the US has stopped shipping dollars to Iraq's central bank until the new government is formed in Baghdad. Sources quoted by al-Hadath also reported that the US suspended security coordination meetings until a government is formed and those responsible for the bombing of the US embassy and the logistics support base at Baghdad International are identified tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨：美国向伊拉克施压？据《阿拉伯汇》报道，美国已停止向伊拉克中央银行运送美元，直到巴格达组建新政府。据《阿拉伯汇》援引的消息人士称，美国还暂停了安全协调会议，直到政府组建完毕，并查明对巴格达大使馆和巴格达国际机场后勤支援基地爆炸事件负责的人员。推文

text: Visioner ✈️ 🇩🇪 The German Ministry of Defense announced the transfer on April 16 by the company Airbus Defence and Space of the 53rd A400M Atlas military transport aircraft for the country's national air force, thus completing the entire procurement program and marking the end of an 11-year delivery cycle. It is noted that the aircraft will be part of the 62nd Transport Aviation Squadron of the German Air Force. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ✈️ 🇩🇪 德国国防部宣布，空中客车防务与航天公司已于4月16日向该国空军交付了第53架A400M“阿特拉斯”军用运输机，从而完成了整个采购计划，标志着为期11年的交付周期结束。据悉，该飞机将编入德国空军第62运输航空中队。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel London Metropolitan Police arrested two suspects in the arson of a northeast London synagogue last Saturday night. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伦敦大都会警察局逮捕了两名涉嫌上周六晚在伦敦东北部纵火焚烧犹太教堂的嫌疑人。推文

text: Open Source Intel ALERT 🔴 U.S. Embassy Baghdad warns Iranian-aligned Iraqi militias are plotting attacks on U.S. citizens and targets across Iraq. Some Iraqi government elements are providing cover for the militias. Iraqi airspace has reopened but missile, drone, and rocket threats remain. Level 4: "Do not travel to Iraq for any reason. Leave now if you are there." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：警报 🔴 美国驻巴格达大使馆警告称，伊朗支持的伊拉克民兵正在策划针对伊拉克境内美国公民和目标的袭击。一些伊拉克政府成员正在为这些民兵提供掩护。伊拉克领空已重新开放，但导弹、无人机和火箭弹威胁依然存在。4级警告：“无论出于何种原因，请勿前往伊拉克。如果您在那里，请立即离开。”推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz Chinese President Xi Jinping held a phone call with Saudi Arabia’s Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman. He told MbS that China “advocates for an immediate and comprehensive ceasefire.” tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨：中国国家主席习近平与沙特阿拉伯王储穆罕默德·本·萨勒曼通电话。他告诉穆罕默德·本·萨勒曼，中国“主张立即实现全面停火”。推文

text: Pakistan’s army chief Asim Munir told Trump that the U.S. blockade of Iranian ports is blocking renewed U.S.–Iran talks. Trump said he would consider it. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔告诉特朗普，美国对伊朗港口的封锁阻碍了美伊重启谈判。特朗普表示会考虑此事。来源：路透社

text: Open Source Intel UPDATE 🔴 First tsunami waves reached Japan's coast. The largest wave recorded so far measured 80cm, according to Japan's meteorological agency. JUST IN 🔴 A 7.4 magnitude earthquake struck northern Japan, triggering a tsunami warning. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：更新 🔴 第一波海啸已抵达日本海岸。据日本气象厅称，目前记录到的最大海浪为80厘米。突发 🔴 日本北部发生7.4级地震，引发海啸预警。- 开源情报 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @LahavHarkov : Ceasefires deepen Israeli divisions over Trump’s handling of war The most recent poll on the matter, taken before the Lebanon ceasefire was announced, found that 51% of Israelis oppose a ceasefire with Hezbollah and only 29% support it. Nearly half (48%) of Israels do not trust President Donald Trump to consider Israeli interests in negotiations with Iran, while 33% do. https://jewishinsider.com/2026/04/israel-u-s-iran-lebanon-trump-hezbollah-netanyahu-ceasefire/ tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨：转发 @LahavHarkov：停火加深了以色列在特朗普处理战争方式上的分歧。在黎巴嫩停火宣布前进行的最新民调显示，51%的以色列人反对与真主党停火，只有29%的人支持。近一半（48%）的以色列人不信任唐纳德·特朗普总统在与伊朗的谈判中会考虑以色列的利益，而33%的人表示信任。https://jewishinsider.com/2026/04/israel-u-s-iran-lebanon-trump-hezbollah-netanyahu-ceasefire/ 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @mahdijasimg : My understanding of this is the UAE may be mitigation-planning for a potential prolonged or repeated crisis. Emirati officials haven’t formally requested a swap line per the report, but perhaps floated the idea as a potential need if things get worse. https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/iran-war-us-talks-2026/card/u-a-e-asks-u-s-about-a-wartime-financial-lifeline-MbVTaBYM28mVhLTGaRTH tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨：转发 @mahdijasimg：据我理解，阿联酋可能是在为潜在的长期或反复危机进行缓解规划。据报道，阿联酋官员尚未正式要求建立货币互换额度，但可能已经提出如果局势恶化，这可能是一种潜在需求。https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/iran-war-us-talks-2026/card/u-a-e-asks-u-s-about-a-wartime-financial-lifeline-MbVTaBYM28mVhLTGaRTH 推文

text: Netanyahu posted a long statement trying to explain how much Israel loves Christians after an IDF soldier smashed a statue of Jesus in Lebanon.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡发表了一份长篇声明，试图解释以色列有多么热爱基督徒，此前一名以色列国防军士兵在黎巴嫩砸毁了一尊耶稣雕像。

text: ⚡️ 🇯🇵 A magnitude 7.4 earthquake struck off the Sanriku coast at a depth of 10km. The maximum intensity reached 5+ on the Japanese scale. Tsunami warnings have been issued for Iwate Prefecture, the central part of Hokkaido’s Pacific coast, and Aomori Prefecture’s Pacific coast. Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi urged residents in affected areas to immediately evacuate to higher ground or evacuation buildings. The government has set up a contact room in the Crisis Management Centre to assess damage and coordinate emergency response. “Human and material damage is currently being confirmed,” the Prime Minister said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇯🇵 三陆海岸附近发生7.4级地震，震源深度10公里。日本地震烈度达到5强。岩手县、北海道太平洋沿岸中部及青森县太平洋沿岸已发布海啸警报。日本首相高市早苗敦促受灾地区居民立即撤离至高地或避难建筑。政府已在危机管理中心设立联络室，以评估损失并协调应急响应。首相表示：“目前正在确认人员和财产损失情况。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 The image of an IOF soldier smashing a statue of Jesus was so damning it forced even Satan's Spawn himself to comment. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 以色列国防军士兵砸毁耶稣雕像的画面令人震惊，甚至连撒旦的化身本人都被迫发表评论。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇩🇪 ⚡️ Freedom of Speech: Europe Version . German police assault a woman at pro-Palestine demo in Berlin. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇩🇪 ⚡️ 言论自由：欧洲版。德国警察在柏林举行的亲巴勒斯坦示威活动中袭击了一名妇女。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇷🇺🇺🇦 Ukrainian Navy launched a Neptune cruise missile strike tonight against the Atlant Aero plant in Taganrog, Rostov oblast. The factory is believed to be producing drone components. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 New satellite imagery shows that two buildings of the Atlant Aero plant in Taganrog were hit by Neptune cruise missiles. 5 more similar buildings appear to be intact. The factory produces Molynia strike drones widely used by the Russian forces. 47°12'01"N 38°52'49"E @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇷🇺🇺🇦 乌克兰海军今晚对位于罗斯托夫州塔甘罗格的Atlant Aero工厂发动了海王星巡航导弹袭击。据信该工厂生产无人机零部件。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 新的卫星图像显示，塔甘罗格的Atlant Aero工厂有两栋建筑被海王星巡航导弹击中。另有5栋类似建筑似乎完好无损。该工厂生产俄罗斯军队广泛使用的Molynia攻击型无人机。 47°12'01"N 38°52'49"E @wfwitness

text: Michael A. Horowitz An Indian Government official said 10 "of our ships" safely crossed through the strait of Hormuz tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 一位印度政府官员表示，10艘“我们的船只”安全穿过了霍尔木兹海峡 推文

text: Open Source Intel A senior Iranian official to Reuters: "Iran's defensive capabilities, including its missile program, are not up for negotiation." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一位伊朗高级官员对路透社表示：“伊朗的防御能力，包括其导弹计划，不在谈判范围内。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese President Joseph Aoun: "Lebanon faces two options: the continuation of the war with all its humanitarian, social, economic and sovereign consequences, or negotiations to end the war and achieve lasting stability. I chose negotiations, and I hope we will be able to save Lebanon." Aoun announced bilateral talks will be led by Ambassador Simon Karam, aimed at ending hostilities and deploying the Lebanese army to the internationally recognized southern border. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩：“黎巴嫩面临两个选择：继续战争，承担其在人道主义、社会、经济和主权方面的所有后果；或者通过谈判结束战争，实现持久稳定。我选择了谈判，希望我们能够拯救黎巴嫩。”奥恩宣布，双边会谈将由西蒙·卡拉姆大使领导，旨在结束敌对行动，并将黎巴嫩军队部署到国际公认的南部边界。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu: "I was shocked and saddened" by an IDF soldier's damage to a statue of Jesus. "I condemn the act in the strongest terms. Severe disciplinary measures will be taken." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046172623197950223/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 内塔尼亚胡：“我对一名以色列国防军士兵损坏耶稣雕像感到震惊和悲痛。”“我以最强烈的措辞谴责这一行为。将采取严厉的纪律处分。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046172623197950223/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel China condemned the U.S. seizure of an Iranian cargo ship, calling it a "forced interception." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 中国谴责美国扣押一艘伊朗货船，称其为“强行拦截”。 推文

text: Nuno Felix This is complete nonsense. All those artillery shells, SPGs, Aircraft, Bombs, drones and Cruise missiles must be Chinese. There are issues in specific areas like GMLRS and AD. But we produce quite significant numbers of weapons. May I politely ask why Europe hasn‘t managed to start producing weapon systems for Ukraine & itself after 4 years of the worst war on the continent? Or is this also the fault of the Americans? Are we Europeans that kind of infantile and with zero skin in the game? Embarrassing. - Velina Tchakarova tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 这完全是胡说八道。所有那些炮弹、自行火炮、飞机、炸弹、无人机和巡航导弹一定都是中国的。在GMLRS和防空等特定领域确实存在问题。但我们生产了相当数量的武器。我可以礼貌地问一下，为什么欧洲在经历了大陆上最严重的战争4年后，还没能开始为乌克兰和自身生产武器系统？或者这也是美国人的错？我们欧洲人真的那么幼稚，且完全没有切身利益吗？真丢人。 - Velina Tchakarova 推文

text: Open Source Intel Ukrainian military intelligence released footage of drone strikes on two Russian Navy landing ships docked in Sevastopol. The Yamal and Nikolai Filchenkov were hit while in port. Strikes took place two nights ago. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046170873711780254/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 乌克兰军事情报部门发布了无人机袭击停泊在塞瓦斯托波尔的两艘俄罗斯海军登陆舰的画面。“亚马尔”号和“尼古拉·菲尔琴科夫”号在港口时被击中。袭击发生在两天前。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046170873711780254/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump reassured Lebanese President Joseph Aoun during Thursday's phone call about the possibility of extending the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire if needed, per Lebanese MTV. Trump also expressed understanding of the need to set conditions before a direct meeting with Netanyahu, a point Aoun plans to clarify further with Trump. Preparations are underway for a meeting between Lebanese President Joseph Aoun and President Trump, expected "soon," according to Lebanon's MTV News. Netanyahu will not be part of the meeting. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046157411489108186/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据黎巴嫩MTV报道，特朗普在周四的通话中向黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩保证，如有必要，可以延长以色列与黎巴嫩的停火协议。特朗普还表示理解在与内塔尼亚胡直接会面之前设定条件的必要性，奥恩计划与特朗普进一步澄清这一点。据黎巴嫩MTV新闻报道，黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩与特朗普总统的会晤正在筹备中，预计“很快”举行。内塔尼亚胡将不会参加此次会晤。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046157411489108186/photo/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: DR Congo Peace Efforts Advance With Agreement to Protect Civillians DR Congo government & M23 rebels agreed on aid access, prisoner releases within 10 days, and a ceasefire monitoring mechanism after April 14-18 talks in Switzerland. READ MORE
text_zh: 刚果民主共和国和平努力取得进展，达成保护平民协议。刚果民主共和国政府与“3月23日运动”（M23）叛军在瑞士举行4月14日至18日的会谈后，就援助准入、10天内释放囚犯以及停火监督机制达成一致。阅读更多

text: 🇧🇬 'We have been told that we must follow a single path and that path is Euro-Atlantic integration, membership in NATO and in EU... However, neither of the two has brought benefits to Bulgaria' Kostadin Kostadinov, Bulgarian MP, chairman of 'Revival' party, exclusively to RT 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇧🇬 “我们被告知必须遵循单一道路，那就是欧洲-大西洋一体化，加入北约和欧盟……然而，这两者都没有给保加利亚带来任何好处。”保加利亚议员、“复兴”党主席科斯塔丁·科斯塔迪诺夫独家接受RT采访 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚠️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Netanyahu: new developments in the war with Iran are possible at any moment 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ⚠️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 内塔尼亚胡：与伊朗的战争随时可能出现新进展 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 The Philippine Army killed at least 10 communist New People’s Army fighters in multiple clashes on April 19 in Toboso, Negros Island, with the military saying the death toll could be as high as 19 including a local commander Roger Fabillar. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 4月19日，菲律宾陆军在内格罗斯岛托博索（Toboso）的多场冲突中击毙了至少10名共产主义“新人民军”（New People’s Army）武装分子。军方表示，包括当地指挥官罗杰·法比拉尔（Roger Fabillar）在内，死亡人数可能高达19人。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺Residents of Tuapse, Krasnodar Krai region, record the massive scale of the fire at the oil refinery after a Ukrainian drone strike. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 The oil depot of Tuapse continued to burn this morning following a large drone strike. Previous footage from the fire showed nearly 10 separate impacts suggesting that the local air defense was saturated or too thin to repell the attack. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺克拉斯诺达尔边疆区图阿普谢（Tuapse）的居民记录了乌克兰无人机袭击后，炼油厂发生大规模火灾的场景。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 在遭到大规模无人机袭击后，图阿普谢的油库今晨持续燃烧。之前的火灾视频显示有近10处独立的撞击点，这表明当地的防空系统已饱和或过于薄弱，无法抵御此次袭击。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷🇦🇪🇹🇷🇬🇧 Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Sa’ar announced that Iran attempted twice to harm Israeli personnel in the United Arab Emirates during Operation Roaring Lion – once using an explosive drone and once via a separate cell. Since the start of the…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇦🇿 The Mossad claimed that it has foiled an Iranian‑directed cell plot to damage the Baku‑Tbilisi‑Ceyhan oil pipeline, as well as Jewish and Israeli targets in Azerbaijan, and that it was foiled several weeks ago. The alleged cell allegedly sought to attack the Israeli embassy in Baku, a synagogue and leaders of the Jewish community. Azerbaijani authorities arrested the alleged members with alleged explosive drones and fragmentation devices allegedly smuggled into the country. The cell allegedly conducted physical surveillance and photography under direct guidance from handlers in Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷🇦🇪🇹🇷🇬🇧 以色列外交部长吉德翁·萨尔（Gideon Sa’ar）宣布，伊朗在“咆哮狮子”（Operation Roaring Lion）行动期间，曾两次试图伤害在阿拉伯联合酋长国的以色列人员——一次使用爆炸性无人机，另一次通过一个独立的行动小组。自……开始以来” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇦🇿 摩萨德声称，他们挫败了一个由伊朗指挥的行动小组的阴谋，该小组企图破坏巴库-第比利斯-杰伊汉（Baku-Tbilisi-Ceyhan）输油管道，以及阿塞拜疆境内的犹太和以色列目标。据称该阴谋在几周前被挫败。该团伙据称试图袭击以色列驻巴库大使馆、一座犹太教堂以及犹太社区领袖。阿塞拜疆当局逮捕了涉案成员，并查获了据称走私入境的爆炸性无人机和破片装置。该团伙在伊朗操纵者的直接指导下进行了实地监视和拍照。 @wfwitness

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Ukraine's HUR MO released footage from strikes with OWA-UAVs on the Russian Navy's Project 775 Ropucha-class large landing ship "Yamal" and Project 1171 Tapir-class large landing ship "Nikolai Filchenkov" docked in the port of Sevastopol, Crimea. The attacks took place two nights ago. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）乌克兰国防部情报总局（HUR MO）发布了使用OWA-UAV（单向攻击无人机）袭击俄罗斯海军停泊在克里米亚塞瓦斯托波尔港的“775型”蟾蜍级大型登陆舰“亚马尔号”（Yamal）和“1171型”貘级大型登陆舰“尼古拉·菲尔琴科夫号”（Nikolai Filchenkov）的视频。袭击发生于两天前。推文

text: WarTranslated HUR strike drones have hit two high-value Russian ships in the bay of occupied Sevastopol. The video shows the large landing ships "Yamal" and "Nikolay Filchenkov", valued at $80 million and $70 million, respectively. Both ships have been disabled. /1606301574/8234 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046166999152181399/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated HUR攻击无人机击中了被占领的塞瓦斯托波尔湾内两艘俄罗斯高价值舰艇。视频显示了大型登陆舰“亚马尔号”和“尼古拉·菲尔琴科夫号”，其价值分别为8000万美元和7000万美元。两艘舰艇均已丧失作战能力。 /1606301574/8234 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046166999152181399/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @kromark : 1/2 At least two buildings at the Atlant Aero drone plant in Taganrog, Russia, were severely damaged following the Ukrainian strike on April 19, as seen in a low-resolution @Planet image taken yesterday (high-res from Apr. 5th for reference). https://twitter.com/kromark/status/2046133406015115435/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @kromark：1/2 4月19日乌克兰袭击后，俄罗斯塔甘罗格（Taganrog）的Atlant Aero无人机工厂至少有两座建筑物严重受损，从昨天拍摄的低分辨率 @Planet 卫星图像中可见（参考4月5日的高分辨率图像）。 https://twitter.com/kromark/status/2046133406015115435/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel ISNA: Iran is examining the U.S. proposal submitted through Pakistan. Despite the public bluster, U.S. and Iran have made progress toward a deal since April 12th talks, U.S. officials say. Nuclear enrichment and the Strait of Hormuz remain in dispute. - NYT - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）ISNA：伊朗正在审查美国通过巴基斯坦提交的提案。美国官员称，尽管公开场合言辞激烈，但自4月12日会谈以来，美伊在达成协议方面已取得进展。核浓缩和霍尔木兹海峡问题仍存在争议。 - 《纽约时报》 - 开源情报 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @MoNDefense : The #PLA Navy’s Liaoning aircraft carrier (CV-16) transited the Taiwan Strait today. #ROCArmedForces have monitored the situation and responded. https://twitter.com/MoNDefense/status/2046153329106112951/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @MoNDefense：中国人民解放军海军“辽宁号”航空母舰（CV-16）今日穿越台湾海峡。台湾武装部队已监控局势并作出应对。 https://twitter.com/MoNDefense/status/2046153329106112951/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇷🇺 🇷🇸 🇪🇺 Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov: Serbia is facing direct demands from bureaucrats in Brussels to adopt an anti-Russian stance and impose sanctions against Russia. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046163094510932458/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇷🇺 🇷🇸 🇪🇺 俄罗斯外交部长谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫：塞尔维亚正面临布鲁塞尔官僚的直接要求，即采取反俄立场并对俄罗斯实施制裁。 https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046163094510932458/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇹🇼 🇨🇳 China's PLA Navy Liaoning aircraft carrier (CV-16) transited the Taiwan Strait today, according to Taiwan's Ministry of National Defense. ➡️ The ministry added that its armed forces "monitored the situation and responded." https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046162286692237781/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇹🇼 🇨🇳 据台湾国防部称，中国人民解放军海军“辽宁号”航空母舰（CV-16）今日穿越台湾海峡。➡️ 该部门补充称，其武装部队“监控了局势并作出应对”。 https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046162286692237781/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israeli FM Sa'ar: Iran tried twice to strike Israeli personnel in the UAE during "Roaring Lion", once with an explosive drone, once with an operational cell. Since the war began roughly two years ago, about 30 attacks and attempted attacks against Israeli embassies and diplomats have been identified worldwide. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）以色列外长萨尔：伊朗在“咆哮狮子”行动期间曾两次试图袭击在阿联酋的以色列人员，一次使用爆炸性无人机，一次使用行动小组。自战争开始约两年来，全球已确认约30起针对以色列大使馆和外交官的袭击及未遂袭击。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇷🇺 A massive oil spill has been detected in the Black Sea near the Tuapse coastline, measuring approximately 7 km in length and 1.5 km in width. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2046161935905800650/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇷🇺 在图阿普谢海岸附近的黑海海域发现了一起大规模石油泄漏，长度约7公里，宽度约1.5公里。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2046161935905800650/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Despite the public bluster, U.S. and Iran have made progress toward a deal since April 12th talks, U.S. officials say. Nuclear enrichment and the Strait of Hormuz remain in dispute. - NYT tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）美国官员称，尽管公开场合言辞激烈，但自4月12日会谈以来，美伊在达成协议方面已取得进展。核浓缩和霍尔木兹海峡问题仍存在争议。 - 《纽约时报》 推文

text: Open Source Intel IEA Executive Director Fatih Birol proposed building a new oil pipeline from Iraq's Basra fields to Türkiye's Ceyhan terminal to bypass the Strait of Hormuz. Birol: "I believe a Basra-Ceyhan pipeline could be extremely attractive and a very important project for both Iraq and Türkiye, as well as for regional supply security, especially from Europe's perspective. Now is exactly the right time." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）国际能源署（IEA）执行署长法提赫·比罗尔（Fatih Birol）提议修建一条从伊拉克巴士拉油田到土耳其杰伊汉终端的新输油管道，以绕过霍尔木兹海峡。比罗尔：“我相信巴士拉-杰伊汉输油管道对伊拉克和土耳其，以及从欧洲的角度来看对区域供应安全都极具吸引力，是一个非常重要的项目。现在正是恰当的时机。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Since the ceasefire began, the U.S. military has surged the Middle East with at least 75 different shipments, that’s roughly 15,000,00 lbs of weapons. (Just in case) https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046160708350448079/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）自停火开始以来，美军已向中东运送了至少75批物资，总计约1500万磅的武器。（以防万一） https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046160708350448079/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu condemned an IDF soldier’s act of damaging a Catholic religious icon in southern Lebanon, calling it a “criminal act”. He said military authorities are conducting a criminal investigation and will take severe disciplinary measures. Netanyahu stressed that Israel upholds Jewish values of tolerance and mutual respect. While Christians are being slaughtered in Syria and Lebanon by Muslims, the Christian population in Israel is thriving and growing – the only place in the Middle East where Christian standards of living are rising. He expressed regret for the incident and any pain caused to believers in Lebanon and worldwide. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡谴责了一名以色列国防军（IDF）士兵在黎巴嫩南部损坏天主教宗教圣像的行为，称其为“犯罪行为”。他表示，军事当局正在进行刑事调查，并将采取严厉的纪律处分。内塔尼亚胡强调，以色列坚持犹太人的宽容和相互尊重的价值观。虽然基督徒在叙利亚和黎巴嫩正遭到穆斯林的屠杀，但以色列的基督徒人口却在蓬勃发展和增长——这是中东地区唯一一个基督徒生活水平在提高的地方。他对这一事件以及给黎巴嫩和世界各地的信徒造成的任何痛苦表示遗憾。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Russia attempted to kill Ukrainian Ministry of Defense adviser Sergey Beskrestnov tonight using Geran-2 drones. Four drones were used against his house, one of them impacted the house. Beskrestnov is now hospitalized. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 今晚，俄罗斯试图使用“天竺葵-2”无人机暗杀乌克兰国防部顾问谢尔盖·别斯克雷斯特诺夫（Sergey Beskrestnov）。四架无人机被用于袭击他的住所，其中一架击中了房屋。别斯克雷斯特诺夫目前已住院。 @wfwitness
